description: You are a DevOps engineer taking over three 'pet' containers that were manually configured: acme-frontend, acme-api, and acme-cron. Reverse-engineer their state and create reproducible Dockerfiles for each in ~/projects/reproducible-images/[container-name]/Dockerfile. Build new images tagged [container-name]:reproducible that function identically to the running containers. Write a summary of your findings in ~/Desktop/container_audit.txt. The original containers must remain running for reference; do not stop or delete them.
